column1: # Rea-Sixty release codenames. Source-of-truth for the About-tab
# "Codename:" line. One entry per row: tag (with leading v) TAB codename.
# Parsed by extension/cmake/write_commit_count.cmake on every build —
# git describe must match the tag exactly (post-release dev builds with
# a `-N-gabc` suffix strip back to the base tag, so a v0.1.10 codename
# also shows on its dirty / post-release builds until the next tag).
# Frank picks each codename at release time; old versions without an
# entry render the About line empty.

column2: Monday is my favorite time of year
